betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Satellite§f is the §6orbital workhorse§f of the AR progression — a compact craftable item that, once launched into orbit, performs a specific function (ore scanning, biome mapping, mass detection, etc.) for the player on the ground. A satellite requires a §6Satellite Primary Function§f module, a §6Data Unit§f, and a §6Satellite Builder§f (10039) to assemble.

§6Production Path (advancedRocketryTweaks.zs:112, replaces "advancedrocketry:satellite")§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shapeless§f
- Input: 1x §6HBM Satellite Base§f (hbm:sat_base), 1x §6HBM Satellite ID-Chip§f (hbm:sat_chip)
- Output: 1x §6Satellite§f (advancedrocketry:satellite)
- The CT tweak removes the original `advancedrocketry:satellite` JSON recipe (which used §6sheetAluminum§f, §6stickTitanium§f, and §6ic:3§f) and substitutes the HBM sat_base + sat_chip

The satellite is launched into orbit using a rocket with a §6Satellite Bay§f block (advancedrocketry:loader:1). Once in orbit, it requires a §6Satellite Power Source§f (chain) — typically a §6Solar Panel§f — to maintain operations. The satellite's data is transmitted to a §6Satellite Control Center§f (10041) for processing.

The satellite item is a prerequisite for the §6Satellite Power & Storage§f (10042) and §6Satellite Sensors & Instruments§f (10043) questlines. It is also the foundation of the §6Planet Holo Selector§f (chain) which displays satellite-collected data on a holographic globe.

§eTip§f: The §6HBM Satellite ID-Chip§f in the recipe can be substituted with the AR §6Satellite ID Chip§f (advancedrocketry:satelliteidchip) for AR-specific satellites — this lets you chain AR satellites to HBM's NTM sat infrastructure. Pair with a §6Data Unit§f from the §6Crystallizer§f (10006) for maximum storage capacity.
